passive.name: Passive: Raging Tide
passive.description:
The next normal attack will be strengthened every 6 seconds. Enhanced normal attacks deal an additional 209 (110 + 60% of physical attack) physical damage and restore 104 HP (55 + 30% of physical attack + 3% of missing HP).
Whenever you receive true physical damage or hit an enemy with a skill, you gain 1 stack of Fortitude (up to 10 stacks), and each stack increases your physical defense by 16-32 for 6 seconds.

skill1.name: Skill 1: Wave Render
skill1.description: Charges in the specified direction and deals 199 (125 + 45% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route. When charging to the maximum distance, it deals 399 (250 + 90% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies within range. After a certain period of time, deals additional physical damage to enemies within the same range and knocks them up for 1 second.

skill2.name: Skill 2: Typhoon
skill2.description:
Step forward and mow down enemies within range, dealing 296 (180 + 70% of physical attack) physical damage and applying 1 stack of Movement Speed ​​Reduction. This effect can stack up to 3 times, and each stack reduces enemy movement speed by 15% for 2 seconds. This skill can be activated 3 times before going on cooldown, and each activation increases physical damage by 25%.
When activated, the CD of normal attacks is reset.

skill3.name: Skill 3: Set Sail!
skill3.description:
Board a ship and set sail in the specified direction for 12 seconds. While sailing, you gain super armor effect and gradually increase your movement speed. The ship deals 549 (350 + 120% of physical attack) physical damage to enemy minions or non-large monsters and knocks them back.
If you activate the skill again in the specified direction while sailing, you will be able to get off the ship at the specified location. If the ship hits a wall, tower/crystal, large monster, or enemy hero, an explosion will occur before the sailing time ends. The explosion deals 549 (350 + 120% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies within the area and knocks them up for 1-1.5 seconds (proportional to the time traveled). Gain 5 stacks of Fortitude when your ship's explosion hits an enemy.
When the ruler of the ocean is piloting a ship, allied heroes near the ship can board the ship as passengers and sail by tapping a button. If a passenger activates a movement skill, receives a Hard CC, or if the Lord of the Seas disembarks, the passengers also disembark.
Deals physical damage and knocks back.
If you activate the skill again in the specified direction while sailing, you will be able to get off the ship at the specified location. If the ship hits a wall, tower/crystal, large monster, or enemy hero, an explosion will occur before the sailing time ends. The explosion deals 549 (350 + 120% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies within the area and knocks them up for 1-1.5 seconds (proportional to the time traveled). Gain 5 stacks of Fortitude when your ship's explosion hits an enemy.
When the ruler of the ocean is piloting a ship, allied heroes near the ship can board the ship as passengers and sail by tapping a button. If a passenger activates a movement skill, receives a Hard CC, or if the Lord of the Seas disembarks, the passengers also disembark.

synergy.reason: By gathering enemies in one place, you can maximize Sun Ce's powerful ranged attacks.
By refreshing your skills, you can hit powerful combos again.

counters.reason: Because the debuff removal skill can negate Sun Ce's powerful CC combo.
It has high durability and CC resistance, and can withstand forcible attacks.

strengths: Long distance movement and powerful initiation ability with ultimate
Lock down enemies and assist allies with abundant CC
Stack physical defense and high sustain with passive skills
weaknesses: It is easy to be incapacitated against heroes with CC invalidity or cleansing.
Damage and presence decrease during cooldown after skill usage.
Weak against enemies with percentage damage and high defense penetration
strategy.earlyGame: パッシブによる物理防御のスタックと回復効果を活かし、レーン戦で積極的にダメージトレードを行います。スキルコンボを駆使して序盤から対面を圧倒することも十分に可能です。
strategy.midGame: レベル4でアルティメットを習得してからは、船に乗って他レーンへの高速ガンクを仕掛けます。マップを常に確認し、小規模戦が起きそうな場所へ即座に駆けつけて数的有利を作りましょう。
strategy.lateGame: 終盤は強力なイニシエーターとして機能します。味方と連携して敵の後衛キャリーに向かって船で突撃し、広範囲のCCを叩き込んで集団戦の口火を切る役割を担います。
strategy.teamfight: 船での突撃からスキル1、スキル2と繋ぐCCチェインが非常に強力です。可能であれば味方のメイジやマークスマンを船に乗せて一緒に突撃し、一気に敵の陣形を崩して壊滅させることを狙います。
strategy.commonMistakes: 味方が追いつけない距離から単独で船で突っ込み、孤立して倒されてしまうのは典型的なNG行動です。また、船の操作を誤って壁や障害物にぶつかり、イニシエートに失敗しないよう操作練習が必要です。

passive.name: Passive: Piercing Brush
passive.description:
The third normal attack becomes an enhanced normal attack, dealing an additional 255 (255 + 50% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies along the route. When the ink from each skill touches each other, it deals 255 (255 + 50% of magic attack) magic damage to nearby enemies (50% damage if hit consecutively within 1 second).
When touched by a brush, HP is recovered by 100 (100 + 22% of magic attack) and normal attacks are strengthened.

skill1.name: Skill 1: Ink Burst
skill1.description: Splashes ink in the specified direction, dealing 200 (200 + 40% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies it touches. When it reaches its maximum distance, the ink explodes, dealing 200 (200 + 40% of magic attack) magic damage.

skill2.name: Skill 2: Seething Script
skill2.description:
Run the brush starting from one selected location and ending at your own position. The moment the brush touches the ground, it deals 150 (150 + 20% of magic attack) magic damage to the enemy. Deals 300 (300 + 40% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies touched while running the brush and reduces movement speed by 25% for 2 seconds.
1 stack of brush force every 10 seconds (maximum 2 stacks, changes depending on cooldown reduction).

skill3.name: Skill 3: Finishing Stroke
skill3.description:
Floats with ink and deals 250 (250 + 32% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies along the route. If you hit an enemy or another active skill brush while charging, you can charge again by moving again within 3 seconds. After 3-5 lunges, it jumps into the air (cannot be targeted while jumping and removes all types of CC) and attacks nearby enemies in succession, dealing 460 (460 + 70% magic attack) magic damage (3/4/5 lunges attack 4/7/10 times each; damage to the same unit is reduced to 25%).
You can charge up to 5 times, and you can activate attacks and skills even when stopped, and when interrupted, the CD will be reduced by 20% to 80% depending on the number of activations.

counters.reason: This is because the assault is interrupted by a confirmed suppression CC and the transition to flight status is prevented.

strengths: Invincibility and overwhelming burst damage when activating ultimate
High mobility using multiple dashes and ability to dive to the back line
Efficient wave clearing and harassment performance from the beginning
weaknesses: Ultimate's dash combo is extremely difficult, and a mistake can be fatal.
If the combo is interrupted, you will not be able to enter the invincible state and will be defeated easily.
Extremely vulnerable to strong CC (crowd control) that stops movement
strategy.earlyGame: スキル1とスキル2の交差爆発ダメージを利用して素早くミニオンウェーブを処理し、レベル4到達を急ぎます。序盤のハラス性能も高いため、対面の体力を削ってプレッシャーを与えましょう。
strategy.midGame: レベル4でアルティメットを習得すると、圧倒的なキルポテンシャルを持ちます。ジャングラーと連携してサイドレーンにロームし、タワーダイブも辞さない積極的なガンクでキルを量産してスノーボールを狙います。
strategy.lateGame: 終盤は敵が魔法防御アイテムを積み、集団で行動するため、単独でのキルが難しくなります。無闇に突っ込まず、敵のCCスキルが落ちるのを待ってから、確実にアルティメットを完走できるタイミングを見極める必要があります。
strategy.teamfight: 集団戦の開始直後はスキルで遠距離からポークを行い、敵の陣形が崩れたり体力が減ったりした瞬間にアルティメットで後衛に飛び込みます。無敵状態での空中攻撃を敵のキャリーに集中させることが最大の目的です。
strategy.commonMistakes: アルティメットのダッシュコンボに失敗し、空中に飛び立てずに敵のど真ん中で止まってしまうのは絶対に避けたいNG行動です。プラクティスモードで様々な距離からの突進コンボを確実に成功させる練習が必須です。

passive.name: Passive: Howling Blade
passive.description: Attack twice quickly with the twin swords "Red Shadow" and a protective attack, dealing 75 (22 + 30% physical attack) magic damage and 75 (22 + 30% physical attack) physical damage. The first attack can track the target, and the third attack will simultaneously swing the twin swords, dealing 115 (36 + 45% physical attack) true damage, and the interval between subsequent attacks will be slightly longer. Normal attacks and skills that hit enemy heroes gain Fury, increasing physical and magical defense penetration by up to 40% and damage reduction by 20%. When anger reaches the upper limit, recovers 168 HP (80 + 50% physical attack) (the lower the HP, the greater the recovery amount. Up to 3 times. Cooldown is 8 seconds). Allain's physical life steal is 75% and also activates when dealing magic/true damage. Allain's normal attacks only have 60% special effects.

skill1.name: Skill 1: Meteor Kill
skill1.description:
Slashes forward, dealing 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) magic damage to the target and 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) physical damage twice, knocking up the target in front for 0.75 seconds, and performs an additional attack according to the number of stamps on itself.
1 stack: Adds 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) magic damage and 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) physical damage.
2 stacks: Increases knockup range and adds 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) magic damage and 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) physical damage. Can be activated while moving slowly.
3 stacks: Increases the knockup range, deals an additional 177 (110 + 38% physical attack) true damage and 312 (180 + 75% physical attack) true damage, and gains super armor effect at the same time. Can be activated while moving slowly.
Stacks of engravings are obtained when 3 normal attacks/skills hit. Meteor Slash has a 50% chance to activate the critical hit/lifesteal special effect when attacking normally.

skill2.name: Skill 2: Moonlight Flash
skill2.description: Charges in the specified direction, dealing 144 (100 + 25% physical attack) physical damage and 144 (100 + 25% physical attack) magic damage to enemies along the route, and reduces enemy movement speed by 15% for 1.5 seconds. Additionally, your movement speed is increased by 10% for 3 seconds, and the attack speed of your next 3 basic attacks is increased by 40%. "Moonlight Flash" can be stacked once every 10 seconds (varies depending on cooldown reduction), and can be stacked up to 2 times.

skill3.name: Skill 3: Death at Sunset
skill3.description: Select a target hero and fly into the air for 1.5 seconds, making them mobile and untargetable. It then hits the ground, dealing 254 (175+45% physical attack) physical damage and 254 (175+45% physical attack) magic damage to enemy heroes. The closer you are to the Blade of Memories, the more damage you receive. Up to 100%. Each time the Blade of Remembrance hits an enemy hero, it gains Imprint and Fury. If the target is an ally, give yourself and that ally a 627 (450+100% physical attack) shield when falling. This shield amount increases by 1/3 for each enemy hero you damage.

synergy.reason: Combined with Allain's ultimate, you can charge forward and take out the enemy's core in an instant.
Because the shield and guaranteed damage can strongly support Allain's survivability and firepower.

counters.reason: In order to completely contain Allain's combos and transition to invincibility with a guaranteed suppression skill.

strengths: Difficult to counter because it deals a mixture of physical, magical, and confirmed damage.
Strong against continuous fighting due to passive damage reduction and recovery
Evasion and ability to approach targets using ultimate invincibility time
weaknesses: If your actions are blocked by the CC chain, you risk being defeated without being able to do anything.
Easy to be kited by highly mobile Marksman and Assassin
Although strong in the early stages, it is highly dependent on equipment to demonstrate its true value.
strategy.earlyGame: 通常攻撃の連続ヒットによる確定ダメージと回復を活かし、レベル1から強気にダメージトレードを行います。序盤から1v1の殴り合いで優位に立ち、レーンの主導権を握りましょう。
strategy.midGame: 機動力を活かして積極的に小規模戦に参加します。敵のメイジやマークスマンに対してスキル2の突進から入り、強化スキル1のノックアップと確定ダメージを叩き込むコンボでキルを狙います。
strategy.lateGame: 敵の火力が上がる終盤は、正面からの殴り合いでは耐えきれない場面が増えます。パッシブのスタックを意識して維持し、アルティメットの無敵時間を駆使して敵の致命的なスキルを回避しながら戦う技巧が求められます。
strategy.teamfight: 敵の後衛に直接ダイブし、陣形を乱すのが役割です。アルティメットは敵のキャリーをターゲットにして上空から強襲するだけでなく、味方のコアヒーローに付与して巨大なシールドで守るという柔軟な使い方も効果的です。
strategy.commonMistakes: スタックが溜まっていない状態で敵陣に突っ込み、脆さを露呈してすぐに倒されてしまうのはNGです。また、敵の強力なCCスキルをアルティメットで避ける意識を持たず、無駄撃ちしてしまうのも初心者にありがちなミスです。

counters.reason: Because of his rich movement skills, he can easily break the chain of his soul and keep his distance.

strengths: Overwhelming map control with skills that allow you to move while ignoring the terrain
High sustain ability to absorb health from multiple targets
Powerful execution mechanic that instantly kills enemies whose health falls below a certain level
weaknesses: Weak to CC, easily defeated if stopped immediately after engaging
Vulnerable if you receive burst damage before taking advantage of your own recovery or execution

strategy.earlyGame: 序盤はスキル1による地形無視移動を駆使して効率的にジャングルを周回し、敵が予期せぬ壁越しのルートから素早いガンクを仕掛けて試合のペースを握ります。
strategy.midGame: 小規模戦では、通常攻撃のソウルリンクによる中距離からの継続ダメージと回復を維持しながら戦います。敵の体力が処刑ライン（即死ライン）に入った瞬間を見逃さず、確実にキルを回収してスノーボールしましょう。
strategy.lateGame: 終盤は集団戦での耐久力が課題となります。自ら先陣を切って突っ込むのではなく、味方のイニシエートに合わせて後入りし、アルティメットの回復やスキルによるサステインを最大限に活かしてしぶとく立ち回ります。
strategy.teamfight: 敵の最前線にいるタンクを削りつつ、隙を見てスキル1で後衛に接近します。魂の鎖を複数の敵に繋いで回復しながら戦い、体力が減った敵を次々と処刑して連続キルを狙うのが理想的な動きです。
strategy.commonMistakes: エンゲージ直後に敵のCCチェーンを受け、何もできずに倒されてしまうのが最も多い失敗です。また、ソウルリンクの射程外に逃げられやすい機動力の高い敵に対して、無理に追従して孤立してしまうのも危険です。

passive.name: Passive: Soul Resonance
passive.description:
When using a normal attack, the resonance of the sword will link with the enemy's soul for 3 seconds. Soul Chain deals 88% (50% of physical attack) physical damage each time. While the soul chain is connected, the damage frequency will gradually increase, and when it ends, it will deal an additional 211 (70 + 80% of physical attack) magic damage.
100% special effect is applied to the damage at the beginning and end of Soul Chain, and 40% special effect is applied to all other damage.

skill1.name: Skill 1: Path of Passing
skill1.description:
Opens the path to death and deals 280 (280 + 95% of additional physical attack) magic damage to the target hit.
Path of Death accelerates its generation when it touches a wall or the wall of life and death, and deals an additional 150 (150 + 60% of additional physical attack) magic damage on subsequent hits. While on the road, you gain the ability to ignore terrain and increase your movement speed by 50%. When the path first touches a wall, it creates a bridge of death, greatly increasing movement speed when the Halt of Purges crosses it. At the same time, reduce the movement speed of nearby enemies by 15%.
Activating the skill again will call back the sword and enter shaman mode for 4 seconds. Kills a target with less than 10% HP during a normal attack (750-1500% for monsters, changes depending on hero level).
This skill deals the same contact damage to non-hero units, and is automatically recalled when the skill count ends.

skill2.name: Skill 2: Death's Precipice
skill2.description:
Swings around with a sword, dealing 200 (200 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage to the enemy in front, reducing movement speed by 25% for 1 second, and creating a wall of life and death. Gives a mark to enemies who touch the wall of life and death, and deals 140 (140 + 45% of additional physical attack) magic damage to enemies who touch dead branches and reduces movement speed by 25% for 1 second.
The next normal attack will be strengthened, dealing 50% additional damage to the target and recovering 65 (65 + 1.5% of additional maximum HP) HP. If there are targets with the engraving within the attack range, Soul Chain activates the same additional damage and healing effect on all targets with the engraving.
This skill knocks back non-hero units. Soul Chain can link up to 3 targets. If linked with a non-hero unit, the healing effect will be 50%.

skill3.name: Skill 3: Conductor of Souls
skill3.description:
Unleash the power of a shaman and descend from the sky, dealing 380 (380 + 150% of additional physical attack) physical damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back for 0.5 seconds. Unleash the power of a shaman and descend from the sky, dealing 380 (380 + 150% of additional physical attack) physical damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back for 0.5 seconds.
After landing, it becomes a shaman mode for 8 seconds and kills targets with less than 10% HP (750-1500 for monsters, depending on hero level) when using normal attacks.
Healing effect increases by 50% for each enemy hero hit. Up to 100%.The spiritual body's physical attack is 30% of that of the Halt of Purges, and it can only attack normally, but its movement speed and attack speed are faster.

passive.name: Passive: Hidden Dragon
passive.description:
Attributes corresponding to the last two skills used by Blue Sky Dragon are saved (updated each time a skill is used). The main attribute deals 165 (+100% of physical attack) physical damage. The sub-attribute deals 49 (+30% of physical attack) physical damage to other nearby enemies.
When the skill is activated, the Blue Sky Dragon acquires 1 stack of Dragon Soul Mark (up to 3 stacks). After acquiring the engraving, the next normal attack will consume all engravings and attack the target with the dragon soul. The number of attacks increases by 1 for each stack of engraving consumed. This enhanced normal attack has different effects depending on the current main attribute.
When performing additional attacks using the Dragon Soul Seal, the second and subsequent attacks will only deal 50% damage. When switching attributes, the same attributes are preferentially retained.

skill1.name: Skill 1: Flaming Palm
skill1.description:
Releases sword energy, dealing 300 (300 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage and 75 (75 + 15% of additional physical attack) true damage (+50% splash damage to the rear of the target) to up to 3 targets within range. Additionally, obtain 1 stack of Dragon Soul Seal.
When you activate "Twilight Palm Flame", you will gain 1 stack of fire attribute and add 15 physical damage to your normal attacks. The following effects will be exerted depending on the currently saved attributes.
Both main and sub are fire attributes: Damage increases by an additional 50%.
Main attribute is fire: The first attack of the enhanced normal attack deals 103 (54 + 30% of physical attack) true damage, and the next two attacks deal 103 (54 + 30% of physical attack) physical damage.

skill2.name: Skill 2: Downpour
skill2.description:
Releases sword energy, dealing 240 (240 + 35% of additional physical attack) physical damage (+50% splash damage to the rear of the target) to up to 3 targets within range. If hit, recovers 150 (150 + 2.5% of additional maximum HP) HP.
When you activate "Blue Sky Rain", you will gain 1 stack of water attributes and recover 18 HP and 0.5% of maximum MP with normal attacks.
Acquires the following effects depending on the currently saved attributes.
・Both main and sub are water attributes: Recovery effect increases by an additional 50%.
・Main attribute is water: Enhanced Normal attack deals 103 (54 + 30% of physical attack) physical damage 3 times, and when the attack hits, recovers 150 HP (150 + 2.5% of additional maximum HP).
If the skill hits a non-hero unit, the healing effect will be 20%. If a normal attack hits a non-hero unit, the healing effect is reduced to 50%.

skill3.name: Skill 3: Riding the Wind
skill3.description:
Releases sword energy, dealing 240 (240 + 35% of additional physical attack) physical damage (+50% splash damage to the back of the target) to up to 3 targets within range, and knocking them back. Also, own movement speed increases by 30% (decreases continuously).
When you activate ``Slash Slash'', you will gain 1 stack of wind attributes and increase your movement speed by 16.
Acquires the following effects depending on the currently saved attributes.
・Both main and sub attributes are wind attributes: Movement speed is additionally increased by 50%.
・Main attribute is wind attribute: Deals 103 (54 + 30% of physical attack) physical damage and knocks back 3 times when using a strengthened normal attack.

skill4.name: Skill 4: Infinite Vastness
skill4.description:
Soars into the sky as a dragon for up to 4.5 seconds. During this time, you will be unable to attack, ignore the terrain, and become unable to target (can be interrupted by tapping again). After that, it swoops forward (untargetable), deals 400 (400 + 80% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route, reduces movement speed by 15%, deals the same damage again to enemies at the landing point, and applies the Scary Dragon effect for 1 second.
After that, attack speed increases by 20% and range increases by 50 for 10 seconds, and attacks with Shinryuken. During this time, additional damage will be dealt to up to 2 nearby targets using 2 attributes.
Targets given the Scary Dragon effect will automatically move away from the Blue Sky Dragon. During flight, you can freely change the attributes currently held.

synergy.reason: With a strong shield and CC on the first move, Loong can create an environment where he can safely deal damage.

counters.reason: Because it is easy to avoid Loong's burst damage due to its ability to negate projectiles and high mobility.
Because the skill that nullifies physical damage can completely block Loong's firepower.

strengths: High survival ability and excellent mobility by transforming into a dragon
Different use of burst damage and continuous recovery by strengthening attributes according to skills
Powerful crowd control ability that involves multiple enemies
weaknesses: Highly difficult to operate, such as skill combinations and cooldown management
Depends on skill rotation, so time without skills is vulnerable
It depends on your standing position, and if you get caught in CC, you won't be able to utilize your strengths.
strategy.earlyGame: スキルによる属性強化（火、水、風）のメカニクスを理解し、レーン戦では状況に応じて使い分けます。ハラスには火属性、体力維持には水属性を使い、安全にファームを進めましょう。
strategy.midGame: 属性を組み合わせたコンボで小規模戦での影響力を高めます。アルティメットの龍形態は強力な移動手段であり、敵陣へのダイブや、逆に危険な状況からの緊急離脱として非常に有用です。
strategy.lateGame: 装備が整った終盤の火力は凄まじく、適切な属性付与の通常攻撃で敵を一掃できます。常に味方と行動し、自分の立ち位置を確保しながら、状況に合わせた強化通常攻撃を叩き込み続けましょう。
strategy.teamfight: 集団戦では、火属性によるバーストダメージと風属性によるノックバックCCを巧みに切り替えて戦います。敵のアサシンに接近された場合は、アルティメットを使用してターゲット不可状態になりつつ反撃の機会を窺います。
strategy.commonMistakes: 状況に合わない属性を維持したまま戦闘に入ってしまうのは初心者に多いミスです。また、強力なアルティメットを単なる移動スキルとして無駄遣いし、肝心な集団戦で自衛手段がなく倒されるのもNG行動です。

passive.name: Parting Moon
passive.description: Holds 3 moon rings. Casting "Swift Foot" or "Flowing Light" consumes 1 moon ring. When all moon rings are consumed, the next basic attack is enhanced, and "Swift Foot" and "Flowing Light" enter normal cooldowns. The enhanced basic attack generates 3 orbs, each dealing 50 (+10% Magical Attack) magical damage. When "Swift Foot" and "Flowing Light" hit, they apply 1 stack of mark to the target. Hitting them again triggers a different effect.

skill1.name: Swift Foot
skill1.description: Releases a beam of moonlight forward, dealing 350 (+75% Magical Attack) magical damage. If the target is marked, deals an additional 100 (+22% Magical Attack) true damage.

skill2.name: Flowing Light
skill2.description: Fires 3 glass orbs. The first deals 120 (+22% Magical Attack) magical damage, and the remaining two deal 60 (+11% Magical Attack) magical damage each. Additionally, gains a 250 (+40% Magical Attack) shield for 3s, and movement speed gradually increases by 30% over 2s. If the target is marked, stuns them for 0.5s (stun effect is reduced to 50% if triggered repeatedly).

skill3.name: Phantom Sea Moon
skill3.description: Links with an enemy hero for 1.5s. While linked, gains 50% damage reduction. If the distance becomes too far, the link breaks and the cooldown of "Phantom Sea Moon" is reduced by 75%. After 1.5s, drags the linked target into the Phantom Sea Domain. Inside the domain, gains a 300 (+70% Magical Attack) shield, and skill cooldowns are reduced by 50%. Casting "Phantom Sea Moon" again inside the domain pushes the target 700 units away.

synergy.reason: His strong crowd control can reliably pin down targets, ensuring the ultimate's link doesn't break.
Her high burst damage can easily finish off enemies right after they exit the domain.

counters.reason: Her multiple dashes allow her to instantly create distance and easily break the ultimate's link.
His guaranteed suppress can interrupt the ultimate during its cast time.

strengths: Can isolate key targets with her ultimate, forcing a 1v1 battle.
Stable poke from long range and self-sustain through her passive.
High burst damage from chaining skills by consuming moon energy.
weaknesses: Very squishy if hit by burst damage before casting her ultimate.
Impact decreases against enemies with anti-heal items or high magical defense.
Struggles to escape if forced into close combat or targeted by highly mobile assassins.
strategy.earlyGame: スキル射程を活かして安全な位置からミニオンを処理し、対面にポークダメージを与え続けます。序盤はマナ消費が激しいため、無駄なスキル撃ちは控えて適切にリソースを管理しましょう。
strategy.midGame: アルティメットを習得すると、敵の重要ターゲットを別次元（幻境）に引きずり込む強力な1v1性能を発揮します。孤立した敵を狙って確実にキルを取るか、ガンクに来た敵ジャングラーを隔離して味方を守るといったプレイが可能です。
strategy.lateGame: 終盤は敵のマークスマンや強力なアサシンなど、放置するとチームが壊滅させられる相手をアルティメットで隔離することが最大の任務となります。幻境内で確実に相手を仕留めるか、最低でも足止めして味方の集団戦を有利に導きましょう。
strategy.teamfight: 集団戦の開始直後は後方からスキル1と2でダメージを出し、乱戦になったタイミングで最も厄介な敵にアルティメットを使用します。自分自身も幻境に入るため、リンクする相手を間違えると逆に自分が倒されてしまうリスクに注意が必要です。
strategy.commonMistakes: 自チームより育っている敵の近接キャリーにアルティメットを使用してしまい、幻境の中で一方的にボコボコにされてしまうのは最悪のNG行動です。自分の火力と相手の耐久力を正確に把握し、勝てる相手（または隔離すべき相手）を見極める必要があります。

passive.name: Gift of the Stars
passive.description: When a skill hits an enemy unit, Yao recovers 70 (+2% extra Max HP) Health (healing is halved if it misses). Each skill cast grants 1 stack of Star Power. When Star Power reaches its maximum stacks, skills are enhanced for 3s. Casting an enhanced skill enhances his next basic attack, causing him to dash toward the enemy and deal an additional 100 (+30% Physical Attack) physical damage.

skill1.name: Starlight Slice
skill1.description: Yao swings his sword rapidly, dealing 380 (+120% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to nearby enemies.

forms.description: Yao swings his sword rapidly, dealing 380 (+120% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to nearby enemies.

Yao swings his sword rapidly, dealing 380 (+120% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to nearby enemies and enhancing his next basic attack. Star Power mimics this skill; if Yao and the Star Power hit a unit simultaneously, his Attack Speed increases by 40%.

skill2.name: Star Rush
skill2.description:
Yao dashes along a curved path, dealing 180 (+70% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies along the route and slowing them by 25% for 1-2s.
——A sword technique learned from wandering swordsmen. A flash of divine speed, like a swallow chasing the stars.

forms.description:
Yao dashes along a curved path, dealing 180 (+70% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies along the route and slowing them by 25% for 1-2s.
——A sword technique learned from wandering swordsmen. A flash of divine speed, like a swallow chasing the stars.

Yao moves quickly to the right, dealing 180 (+70% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies along the route, slowing them by 25% for 1-2s, and enhancing his next basic attack. Star Power mimics this skill to the left; if Yao and the Star Power hit a unit simultaneously, the target is knocked up for 0.75s.

skill3.name: Return to Dust
skill3.description:
Yao returns to his position from 2s ago (up to a maximum distance of 600), clears the Star Split effect, and deals 420 (+140% extra Physical Attack) magical damage to enemies along the path and at the destination.
Passive: 40% of damage taken is converted into Star Split, which is deducted from his HP over 2s.

forms.description:
Yao returns to his position from 2s ago (up to a maximum distance of 600), clears the Star Split effect, and deals 420 (+140% extra Physical Attack) magical damage to enemies along the path and at the destination.
Passive: 40% of damage taken is converted into Star Split, which is deducted from his HP over 2s.

Yao returns to his position from 2s ago (up to 600 distance), clears the Star Split effect, and deals 420 (+140% extra Physical Attack) magical damage to enemies along the path and at the destination, enhancing his next basic attack. Star Power mimics this skill; if Yao and the Star Power hit a unit simultaneously, the target is slowed by 25% for 2s.
Passive: 40% of damage taken is converted into Star Split and consumed over 2s.

synergy.reason: By gathering enemies in one spot, Yao can land all his powerful AoE skills at once.
His speed boost and healing further elevate Yao's core strengths of high mobility and survivability.

counters.reason: His guaranteed suppress lock down Yao's mobility, and completely bypasses his Star Split shield.
Similarly powerful suppress completely nullifies Yao's continuous combos and evasions, easily taking him down.

strengths: Versatile combos utilizing the Star Power accumulated through skill usage.
Excellent hit-and-run tactics and backline assassination enabled by high mobility.
High survivability thanks to his ultimate's damage negation (reset).
weaknesses: Complex gauge management and skill sequencing; execution errors can be fatal.
Low inherent durability is easily exposed when locked down by crowd control.
If he fails to secure an early advantage, it's hard to make an impact in late-game team fights.
strategy.earlyGame: 常に星辰の力（パッシブゲージ）を意識し、ゲージを1〜2本溜めた状態でレーン戦やジャングル周回を行います。強化スキルを連続で叩き込むことで、序盤から高いバーストダメージを出すことができます。
strategy.midGame: 持ち前の高い機動力を活かしてジャングルを素早く回り、マップ全体にプレッシャーをかけます。孤立した敵のマークスマンやメイジを狙って急襲し、強化スキルコンボでキルを取って即座に離脱するヒット＆アウェイを徹底しましょう。
strategy.lateGame: 終盤は敵の火力が上がり、突発的なエンゲージはリスクが高くなります。味方のCCに合わせるか、敵の主要なスキルが落ちたタイミングを見計らってから戦闘に参加し、アルティメットのダメージ無効化を活用してしぶとく戦います。
strategy.teamfight: 正面から突っ込むのではなく、側面や背後から敵の後衛を狙います。スキル2で接近し、強化スキル1でダメージを出し、敵の反撃を受けたらアルティメットで元の位置に戻りつつダメージを帳消しにするという、トリッキーな立ち回りが求められます。
strategy.commonMistakes: ゲージ管理をせずに戦闘に入り、強化スキルを出せずに火力が不足するのは初心者の典型的なミスです。また、アルティメットの戻る位置を把握せずに使用し、敵のど真ん中やタワー下に自ら飛び込んでしまうのもNG行動です。

passive.name: Maiden's Trick
passive.description:
Enhanced
The farther Shi is from the enemy, the higher her skill damage. Damage increases by 5% for every 100 units of distance, up to a maximum of 40%.

skill1.name: Silk Imprint
skill1.description:
Shi throws her artifact to a target location, dealing 120 (+24% Magical Attack) magical damage to enemies in the area and pulling them towards it. Furthermore, she wraps a "Silk Imprint" around one enemy hero. Tapping the skill again within 5s forces the enemy to move a certain distance in a designated direction. The artifact's CC can interrupt enemy skill casts.
The effect cannot be triggered if the enemy is too far from Shi. "Silk Imprint" deals double damage to non-hero units.

skill2.name: Silky Beauty
skill2.description:
Shi throws an energy orb that stops upon hitting a monster, dealing 150 (+50% Magical Attack) magical damage every 0.5s to nearby enemies until it explodes. If the orb continuously hits the same target (excluding the first hit), the damage is reduced to 25%. The first enemy hit is slowed by 15% for 1.5s.
After 2s, the orb explodes, dealing 150 (+33% Magical Attack) magical damage, with double damage to enemies at the blast center. The orb will automatically move towards enemies marked with "Silk Imprint".

skill3.name: Sole Focus
skill3.description: Shi enters an enhanced state for 8s, gaining expanded vision and instantly resetting the cooldown of "Silky Beauty". While enhanced, if "Silk Imprint" hits, she can force the enemy to move twice, and the cooldown of "Silky Beauty" is halved. Upon casting the ultimate, she gains 50% movement speed for 0.5s.

synergy.reason: Can gather enemies in an area, perfectly setting up Shi's pull skill and AoE damage.
Shi's pull can forcibly drag enemies into Huang Zhong's devastating attack range.

counters.reason: His AoE debuff removal and CC immunity completely neutralize Shi's pulling mechanics.
His fast dashes and silence allow him to close the gap and burst Shi down before she can pull him.

strengths: Unique crowd control ability that can manipulate enemies and force them to move in a chosen direction.
Distinct passive that scales her skill damage the further away she is from the target.
Ultimate provides instant skill cooldown resets and chained control effects.
weaknesses: Lacks any mobility skills, making it very difficult to escape once enemies close the gap.
Requires predicting enemy movements to land skills, demanding high mechanical skill.
Often lacks the burst damage to secure kills alone, making teamwork essential.
strategy.earlyGame: 敵と距離を取るほどスキルダメージが上がるパッシブを意識し、安全な最大射程からスキル2を置いてミニオン処理とポークを行います。スキル1の牽引は強力ですが、序盤は無理に狙わず防衛やガンク合わせに使いましょう。
strategy.midGame: 味方のジャングラーやサポートと行動を共にし、スキル1で敵を味方陣営へと強制的に引きずり込んでキルを量産します。アルティメット発動時は連続で敵をコントロールできるため、小規模戦で圧倒的な影響力を持ちます。
strategy.lateGame: 終盤の集団戦では、Shiのスキル1が勝敗を直結させると言っても過言ではありません。視界外や茂みから敵のキャリー（マークスマンやメイジ）にスキル1を当て、一瞬で味方の集中砲火を浴びせて瞬殺するキャッチプレイを狙い続けます。
strategy.teamfight: 常に味方の後ろに位置取り、敵の前衛を避けながら後衛にスキルを当てる隙を窺います。自衛スキルや移動スキルがないため、敵のアサシンに接近された場合はアルティメットの移動速度上昇を活かして全力で逃げる必要があります。
strategy.commonMistakes: スキル1を当てることに固執しすぎて前に出すぎ、逆に敵に捕まって倒されてしまうのはNG行動です。また、味方が攻撃できない位置に敵を引き寄せてしまい、せっかくのCCが無駄になってしまうのも初心者にありがちなミスです。

passive.name: Fiery Temper
passive.description:
For every 5% Attack Speed gained, cooldown is reduced by 1%. Hitting targets with basic attacks and skills grants 5 Anger (critical hits grant 10). When Anger reaches its maximum, Meng Ya enters an Excited state.
Excited State: Enhances all skills and reduces the cooldowns of "Awesome Barrage" and "Heavy Shot" by 25%-50%. For every 1 point of excess Anger, he recovers (0-3 + 1% Physical Attack) HP.
If no Anger is gained for a period of time, it will begin to decay continuously after 3 seconds.

skill1.name: Awesome Barrage
skill1.description:
Meng Ya uses "Apocalyptor" to strafe for 5s, dealing 96 (40 + 34% Physical Attack) physical damage per shot. Movement speed is reduced by 50 while strafing, and the skill enters cooldown when the strafe ends.
Excited State: Bullets gain a piercing effect, dealing 50% damage to subsequent enemies. Firing rate increases by 1% for every 2% Attack Speed (up to 100%).
Can be held to sustain fire, and damage can critically hit. You can pause the strafe to cast other skills. Hitting enemies grants 5 Anger; critical hits grant 10.
For every 2% Attack Speed, the skill's cast speed increases by 1%.

skill2.name: Heavy Shot
skill2.description:
Meng Ya fires a heavy round in a target direction, dealing 200 (+50% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 25% for 2s. Upon hitting an enemy, a wall, or reaching max range, it explodes into 5 splinters. Splinters bounce off walls, dealing 410 (+100% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to the first enemy hit.
Excited State: The number of splinters increases from 5 to 9.
Hitting enemies with the heavy round or splinters grants 5 Anger. If multiple splinters hit the same target within 1s, the damage is reduced to 25%.

skill3.name: Missile Mayhem
skill3.description:
Meng Ya scans the surrounding area. If allied heroes attack enemies within range, a mark is applied to the target's location (up to 5). After scanning, he fires missiles that deal 450 (+120% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies hit. Hits on the same target deal 75% reduced damage, and grant him 10 Anger. After scanning, he fires up to 1 missile per second for 8s (if canceled or interrupted, cooldown is reduced by 50%).
Excited State: The minimum firing interval for subsequent missiles is reduced from 1s to 0.5s.
Holding the skill expands the search range for up to 3s. While scanning, Meng Ya's movement speed increases by 50%.

strengths: Exceptional at sustained Area of Effect (AoE) damage and long-range poke.
Self-sustain in the "Excited" state allows him to survive longer and maintain high DPS in team fights.
weaknesses: Lacks mobility (dash) skills, making him highly vulnerable to assassin dives.
Heavily reliant on his Anger gauge and items; struggles to make an impact if he falls behind early.
strategy.playstyle: Always manage your Anger gauge and aim to enter team fights when it's near maximum. Due to low mobility, strictly position yourself safely behind allied tanks. Rely on the continuous damage from Skill 1 and the poke from Skill 2 to whittle down enemies. Prioritize Attack Speed and Cooldown Reduction items to maintain the "Excited" state and maximize your damage output.

synergy.reason: Acts as a frontline shield, creating a safe environment for Meng Ya to dish out sustained long-range damage.
Provides excellent support and healing, perfectly setting up the conditions Meng Ya needs to maintain his DPS in team fights.

counters.reason: High mobility allows her to close the gap quickly and burst him down, exploiting his lack of escape tools.
Applies high pressure and mobility from the early game, easily getting close to deal lethal damage.

passive.name: Hunter
passive.description: When an enemy's HP falls below 30%, they are marked as "Prey". Basic attacks and skills against marked enemies deal an additional 7.5% - 15% true damage.

skill1.name: Wavebreaker
skill1.description:
Harnesses magic to enter a submerged state for 3s, increasing movement speed by 40. When it ends, Lam returns to normal state and the CD is reduced by 50%.
Casting "Wavebreaker" while submerged causes him to leap out of the water and attack. He dashes in a target direction, dealing 300 (+120% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies along the path and slowing them by 25% for 1.5s.

skill2.name: Space Split
skill2.description:
Slashes enemies twice, dealing 225 (+45% extra Physical Attack) physical damage per hit. Each cast grants 1 mark, and additional marks are gained for each enemy hit (cannot gain multiple marks from the same enemy. Max 3 marks). Hitting enemies heals him for 85 (+15% extra Physical Attack + 1% extra Max HP) HP (halved for non-hero units).
When marks are stacked, basic attacks consume 1 mark to become enhanced. Enhanced basic attacks cause him to dash to the enemy, dealing 177 (50 + 75% Physical Attack) physical damage and healing for 85 (+15% extra Physical Attack + 1% extra Max HP) HP. Each follow-up attack reduces the cooldown of Space Split by 10% - 20%.
Casting Space Split while submerged makes him dash in a target direction and reduces the CD of Wavebreaker by 25%.

skill3.name: Death From Below
skill3.description:
Throws a dagger in a target direction, drastically slowing enemies along the path for 0.5s. After a short delay, he dashes to the dagger's location, dealing 520 (+180% extra Physical Attack) physical damage to enemies along the path and pulling them to the dagger's destination.
If submerged, he pulls enemies along the path to the end of the dash and reduces the CD of Wavebreaker by 50%.

strengths: Incredible mobility allows for fast jungle clears and potent ganks.
Excellent at disrupting enemy formations using the forced displacement (push) of his ultimate.
weaknesses: Low durability makes him an easy target if caught by crowd control (CC).
Requires precise skill chaining and combos, making his mechanical difficulty relatively high.
strategy.playstyle: Roam the jungle and lanes rapidly from the early game, hunting isolated targets and squishy backliners to rack up kills. In team fights, don't initiate first; wait for the enemy to burn their primary CC skills before diving their backline. Mastering the flexibility of his ultimate—whether to push enemies toward your team or to escape dangerous situations—is key to his success.

synergy.reason: His powerful CC pins down enemies, creating the perfect window for Lam to land his high-burst combos.
Disrupts the enemy formation and draws attention at the frontline, creating safe opportunities for Lam to dive the backline.

counters.reason: His silence prevents Lam from chaining the skills he relies on for mobility, leaving him stranded.
Frequent long-range stuns hinder Lam's approach, making it hard to utilize his high mobility.

passive.name: mirror image
passive.description:
When the main body and mirror image damage an enemy, they each give two types of marks. When an enemy acquires both marks, the marks are consumed, dealing slashing damage equal to 8% of the target's missing HP, and resetting the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2. The reset effect can only be activated once every 5 seconds on the same target.
When you use the skill, a mirror image will appear for 2 seconds. The mirror image imitates the main body's actions, dealing 30% damage and gaining 30% recovery.

skill1.name: Opening the door
skill1.description:
Charges forward and deals 90 (90 + 60% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies in front and reduces movement speed by 30% (for 1 second).
At the same time, the next normal attack is strengthened and deals an additional 90 (90 + 60% of physical attack) physical damage.

skill2.name: splitting sky
skill2.description:
Deals 90 (90 + 70% of physical attack) physical damage to surrounding enemies and reduces movement speed by 50% (duration: 1 second). Recovers 60 (60 + 24% of physical attack) HP with each hit and applies an effect that reduces movement speed.
If multiple targets are hit, the amount healed is reduced by up to 25% for each subsequent target.

skill3.name: Migata
skill3.description: Acquires 1 stack of ``Migata'' at regular intervals (up to 2 stacks), and when used, activates ``Kyoka Suigetsu'' and replaces its position with its mirror image.

skill4.name: Kyoka Suigetsu
skill4.description:
Charges forward, stuns enemies along the route for 0.5 seconds, and creates a mirror space when it reaches the end. When the space is expanded, enemies in the rush path are drawn to the center of the space. Deployment duration is 10 seconds.
After deploying in space, when a skill is activated or the main body and mirror image perform a normal attack, mirror shards will fly towards the enemy, dealing slashing damage equal to 2% of the target's lost HP. Enemies that touch the edge of the space will take 30 (30 + 30% of physical attack) physical damage and have their movement speed reduced by 50%. While in space, damage taken is reduced by 10% and HP is recovered by 10 (10 + 40% of physical attack) every second.

strengths: Has overwhelming mobility and evasion ability by dashing and switching positions.
By resetting skills using passives, you can create instantaneous and continuous burst damage.
weaknesses: Skill operation is very complex and requires high player skill and practice
Weak against CC, and if you can't lead by gold difference, your presence in the middle and later stages tends to fade.
strategy.playstyle: A powerful combo that resets the skill by hitting the mirror image and the main body attack at the same time, causing constant damage. During ultimate deployment, the positions of the main body and mirror image can be swapped instantly, allowing you to attack unilaterally while avoiding enemy attacks. In group battles, be aware of hit and away, where you wait for an ally to initiate, assassinate an enemy with low health or a soft backline hero with a reliable burst combo, and immediately leave.

synergy.reason: This is because it stops the enemy's movement with a wide range of CC and creates a perfect starting point for skill combos.
Both have high mobility and burst damage, allowing them to quickly annihilate the enemy's backline.

counters.reason: This is because they have extremely high durability and CC, and their skill combos and movements are blocked and they cannot get kills.
Due to the targeted stun and overwhelming burst damage, there is a high risk of being defeated before you can get close.

passive.name: A strange connection with the mountain
passive.description:
Due to a mysterious relationship with monsters, when you get close to a monster, recovery becomes a release (obtains a buff).
When a normal attack hits an enemy, it drops a seed bomb and attracts nearby seed bombs. Picking up a seed bomb yourself increases attack speed and movement speed by 3% for 2.5 seconds (up to 6 stacks).
When an enemy touches the seed bomb, it deals 30 (30 + 10% of additional physical attack) physical damage.

skill1.name: rapid growth
skill1.description:
Create a paradise for animals by growing plants. The attack speed and movement speed of Mountain Child and allied monsters will be increased by 15%, HP will be recovered by 40 (40 + 0.6% of additional maximum HP), and allied monsters will come to the paradise and fight together. The status of companion monsters increases with hero level, and the probability of summoning multiple monsters increases with skill level.
50% of the mountain child's status is reflected in the attack power, attack speed, and critical rate of allied monsters.

skill2.name: Roll! Ponpon!
skill2.description:
"Roll! Pon-Pon!": Move forward while rolling with the Pon-Pon (disable hard CC once). While spinning, gain 40 damage block, deal 240 (240 + 80% of additional physical attack) physical damage to hit enemies, and stun them for 1/2 second. If you hit a wall during the effect period, you will bounce (up to 3 times) and the rotation distance will be reset, the skill effect will increase by 25%, and your next normal attack will be strengthened. Enhanced normal attack releases 3 seed bombs in succession, dealing an additional 60 (60 + 20% of additional physical attack) physical damage.
"Roll! Agudo!": The mountain child rolls forward and strengthens his next normal attack. Enhanced normal attack releases 3 seed bombs in succession, dealing an additional 60 (60 + 20% of additional physical attack) physical damage.

skill3.name: gorge gathering
skill3.description:
Mounted: Pom Pom moves away from the mountain child and jumps to the specified location, dealing 460 (460 + 150% of additional physical attack) physical damage and stunning her for 2/3 seconds. After that, Pom Pom will act alone (50% of Mountain Child's status and 100% of normal attack effect will be reflected).
Separated state: Pom Pom enters recovery mode when defeated. Returns to battle when HP reaches maximum. While Pom Pom is alive, it can be recalled by reactivating it.

strengths: Quick jungle laps and overwhelming object control using your pet's ball
Has a high ability to support allies such as recovery and CC, and is strong in continuous battles in group battles.
weaknesses: The main body of the ball is extremely vulnerable to being hit and cannot withstand burst damage.
It is necessary to maintain a distance from the enemy, and is not good at fighting in narrow jungles or strong dive configurations.
strategy.playstyle: Taking advantage of the automatic absorption of camps by balls, you can control the tempo by quickly moving around the jungle and stealing monsters from the enemy's camp. The basic combo is to use skill 1 to heal your allies and increase attack speed, and use your ultimate to throw a ball to knock up the enemy. A suitable fighting style is to continuously deal damage while ensuring the safety of the main body, and quickly destroy objects such as towers and dragons with your allies.

synergy.reason: Continuous recovery greatly increases the ability to continue fighting both when mounted and when not mounted.
It provides a solid front line and shield, allowing the main body to continue delivering firepower from a safe distance.

counters.reason: Due to its extremely high mobility, it is easy for the jungle to be destroyed, and your farm in the early stages will be hindered.
This is because they are targeted when they are defenseless when they dismount, and it is difficult to escape due to their high pursuit ability.

passive.name: Guardian of Fireflies
passive.description:
When you deal damage with a normal attack, a firefly will be summoned, dealing 100 (100 + 20% of magic attack + 3% of additional maximum HP) magic damage to the enemy and inflicting stealth immunity for 3 seconds. At regular intervals, recovers 60 HP (60 + 10% of magic attack + 1.5% of additional maximum HP) of the nearby ally hero with the lowest HP.
If there are no enemies nearby, charging a normal attack will restore 60 HP (60 + 10% of magic attack + 1.5% of additional maximum HP), but HP recovery of allies will be interrupted.

skill1.name: The power of kuwagi
skill1.description:
Channels the "power of fireflies" into the specified area, dealing 500 (500 + 10% of magic attack) magic damage to enemies within the area and knocking them up for 1 second. Hitting an enemy consumes Firefly's power and deals 100 (100 + 20% of magic attack + 3% of additional maximum HP) magic damage for each stack of Firefly's power.
If there are friendly heroes nearby, consume Firefly's Power and heal the lowest HP of the friendly hero by 60 (60 + 10% of magic attack + 1.5% of additional maximum HP) for each stack of Firefly's Power.
"Power of Firefly": You can obtain 1 stack of Firefly's power every 1.5 seconds (up to 9 stacks). The skill range expands according to the number of stacks.

skill2.name: Wind riding
skill2.description:
Fly to the selected bush, obtain 1 stack of "Firefly Power", and summon 1 firefly every time you fly a certain distance. After 1 second, the fireflies fly towards the hero with the lowest HP, dealing 100 (100 + 20% of magic attack + 3% of additional maximum HP) magic damage to the enemy and inflicting stealth immunity for 3 seconds, or restoring 60 (60 + 10% of magic attack + 1.5% of additional maximum HP) HP of allied heroes.
This skill can be charged 3 times, and when tapped, it flies towards the selected bush.

skill3.name: faint fireflies
skill3.description:
Summons a "bush of light" to the specified location. If activated again within 6 seconds, it will fly to the summoned bush and receive 1 stack of Firefly Power.
“Thicket of Light”: 1 second after summoning the Thicket of Light, it releases fireflies every second towards 5 nearby heroes. Each firefly deals 100 (100 + 20% of magic attack + 3% of additional maximum HP) magic damage or restores 60 (60 + 10% of magic attack + 1.5% of additional maximum HP) HP to an ally hero. When an enemy unit enters a bush of light, it gains vision of that hero. Fireflies caused by bushes of light will no longer appear when they are about to disappear. After the light bush disappears, it becomes a normal bush for 30 seconds.

strengths: Extremely high single-target and area-recovery ability through fireflies, increasing the survivability of allies.
Possesses quick rotation and excellent survival ability due to movement skills that utilize bushes.
weaknesses: You cannot generate your own firepower or receive attacks on the front lines on behalf of your allies.
There are few ways to engage other than recovery, and it is difficult to overturn a situation where allies lack firepower.
strategy.playstyle: It is a support role that is close to the ally's carry (firepower role) and constantly recovers and improves continuous combat ability. Use skill 2 to fly from bush to bush to secure a safe position, and skill 1 to thwart enemy attacks with Knock Up. In group battles, use your ultimate to summon a "bush of light" and form a position where you can safely heal all your allies, leading to an advantageous battle situation.

synergy.reason: Continuous recovery and protection can greatly increase the survival rate against the low-mobility, high-firepower Marksman.
As Tanks continue to fight on the front lines, their high recovery power can raise their actual durability to the maximum.

counters.reason: This is because his movement is blocked by a powerful restraint skill, making it impossible to utilize his mobility to escape by flying over a wall.
Due to the high burst damage, there is a risk of being killed instantly before you can use recovery or escape skills.

passive.name: splash gradient
passive.description:
All skills are considered starting skills. When you hit an enemy with any skill, the next skill you fire will be strengthened as an additional move, and you will receive 1 stack of Engraving for 4 seconds (up to 5 stacks).
When stacked 3 times, the next normal attack will be strengthened to the additional technique "Splash Gradation". Rush towards the enemy and attack 7 times, dealing 121 (80 + 25% of physical attack) physical damage with each attack and reducing enemy movement speed by 10%. The final damage deals physical damage equal to 12% of the target's missing maximum HP. Gain a 21% to 35% damage reduction effect while using enhanced normal attacks.
The additional skill inflicts a disabling effect on the enemy hit, and each stack reduces the enemy's attack speed by 10% to 20% for 4 seconds (maximum 2 stacks). Each time the enemy performs a normal attack, they remove one stack of disfigurement effects.

skill1.name: try slash
skill1.description: Starting technique: Fires a try slash in the specified direction, and after a certain period of time, deals 366 (200 + 100% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route. When Trislash hits an enemy, Rose Swordsman's movement speed increases by 80%. This effect reverts over 2 seconds.

forms.description: Starting technique: Fires a try slash in the specified direction, and after a certain period of time, deals 366 (200 + 100% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route. When Trislash hits an enemy, Rose Swordsman's movement speed increases by 80%. This effect reverts over 2 seconds.

Additional technique: Rapidly fires a try slash in the specified direction, and after a shorter time lag than the starting technique, deals 475 (260 + 130% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route. When Trislash hits an enemy, Rose Swordsman's movement speed increases by 80%. This effect reverts over 2 seconds.

skill2.name: splash fant
skill2.description: Starting technique: Rush in the specified direction and quickly stab 6 times. Deals 69 (45 + 15% of physical attack) physical damage to the enemy hit each time, and recovers own HP by 70 (70 + 1% of additional maximum HP).

forms.description: Starting technique: Rush in the specified direction and quickly stab 6 times. Deals 69 (45 + 15% of physical attack) physical damage to the enemy hit each time, and recovers own HP by 70 (70 + 1% of additional maximum HP).

Additional skill: Rush in the specified direction and quickly stab 6 times. Deals 69 (45 + 15% of physical attack) physical damage to the enemy hit each time, and restores own maximum HP by 70 (70 + 1% of maximum HP). CD is shorter than the starting move.

skill3.name: power gradation
skill3.description:
Starting technique: Draws 7 sword marks on the spot and attacks nearby enemies up to 3 times, dealing 320 (320 + 75% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time and reducing movement speed by 25% for 1 second. While the skill is active, you will gain super armor status and a passive effect that reduces damage taken.
If you damage an enemy multiple times, the damage from the second time onwards will be reduced to 30%.

forms.description:
Starting technique: Draws 7 sword marks on the spot and attacks nearby enemies up to 3 times, dealing 320 (320 + 75% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time and reducing movement speed by 25% for 1 second. While the skill is active, you will gain super armor status and a passive effect that reduces damage taken.
If you damage an enemy multiple times, the damage from the second time onwards will be reduced to 30%.

Additional technique: Quickly draws 7 sword marks on the spot (skill activation speed is faster than the starting technique), attacks nearby enemies up to 3 times, deals 320 (320 + 75% of physical attack) physical damage each time, and reduces movement speed by 25% for 1 second.
If you damage an enemy multiple times, the damage from the second time onwards will be reduced to 30%.
After completing the sword formation, activate "Power Gradation" and deal the same amount of damage again to the enemy in the center of the sword mark, knocking them up for 0.75 seconds. While the skill is active, you will gain super armor status and a passive effect that reduces damage taken.

strengths: Due to the high damage reduction by passive, it is very strong in 1v1 and fistfights between Fighters.
By applying skills continuously, you can easily stick to the enemy and relentlessly pursue the fleeing opponent.
weaknesses: If the activation of a skill is interrupted by CC, the passive will not activate and it will become vulnerable all at once.
You need to prepare to accumulate stacks with pokes, and it is dangerous to jump in without an ally's initiation.
strategy.playstyle: In the early stages, you can safely accumulate stacks with skill 1's long-range poke, and show your true value from the middle stages onwards when the skill turnover rate increases. Hit your skills repeatedly to get additional damage and damage reduction buffs, and stick to your enemies to deal continuous damage. In group battles, instead of rushing in headfirst, it's ideal to match your allies' CC, or take advantage of the timing when the enemy's CC is depleted and finish off the enemy's carry with a duel.

synergy.reason: 強力なCCで敵を拘束してくれるため、パッシブをスタックしやすくコンボを繋げやすい。
By gathering multiple enemies in one place, you can maximize area damage and recovery effects.

counters.reason: Silence forces skill combos to be interrupted and prevents stacking of passives.
Due to its high mobility and kite ability, it does not allow you to get close, and you can only deal damage from a distance.

passive.name: Resonance/Burning
passive.description:
Communicate with the divine spear "Kasuka" and gain 1 stack of resonance when the skill is activated. Consumes all stacks during a normal attack, activates the resonance skills ``Firmness - Battle Stop'', ``Eagerness - Breaking Castle'', and ``True Intention - Ryohara'' according to the number of stacks, and shortens the CD of ``Dangetsu'' and ``Oigumo'' by 1.5 seconds.
Resonance skills can be critical hits. Activation speed increases according to own attack speed (reflection rate 50%).

skill1.name: Dangetsu
skill1.description: Raise the spear forward and then swing it down. Deals 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage (2 times in total) and knocks up for 0.5 seconds when thrusting up.

forms.description: Raise the spear forward and then swing it down. Deals 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage (2 times in total) and knocks up for 0.5 seconds when thrusting up.

Performs continuous attacks with a spear. Increases movement speed by 25 for 1 second, deals 124 (55 + 40% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies (4 times total), and also gains 260 (260 + 4.5% of additional HP) shield (for 2 seconds).
Activates with normal attack when resonance stacks 1.

skill2.name: Oigumo
skill2.description: Raise your spear, charge and charge (maximum movement speed increased by 25%). After charging, charge forward and mow down the enemy, dealing 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) to 360 (360 + 120% of additional physical attack) physical damage and reducing movement speed by 15% for 1 second.

forms.description: Raise your spear, charge and charge (maximum movement speed increased by 25%). After charging, charge forward and mow down the enemy, dealing 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) to 360 (360 + 120% of additional physical attack) physical damage and reducing movement speed by 15% for 1 second.

Performs three consecutive attacks. The first two attacks each deal 129 (60 + 40% of physical attack) physical damage to the enemy and restore 90 HP (90 + 1.3% of additional HP). The final attack deals 258 (120 + 80% of physical attack) physical damage and restores 180 HP (180 + 2.5% of additional HP).
Activates with normal attack when resonance stacks 2. The lower the HP, the more the recovery amount will be (up to 2x).

skill3.name: extra star
skill3.description:
Fills the tip of the spear with flame and moves it back and forth towards the front area, dealing 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time and knocking it up.
When the maximum distance is reached, it will pierce continuously, dealing 90 (90 + 30% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time (4 times in total).
While the skill is active, you will be in a super armor state, reducing damage taken by 30%, and can activate the second stage skill "Roar of Spears" which mowing down and burning the front.
Scrape deals 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage, and Burn Area deals 50 (50 + 16% of additional physical attack) magic damage once every 0.2 seconds for 3 seconds.
The second stage can be activated while "Tracing Star" is activated. Mows down the surrounding area, cancels the subsequent charge, deals 120 (120 + 40% of additional physical attack) physical damage, and burns a circular area for 3 seconds.

forms.description:
Fills the tip of the spear with flame and moves it back and forth towards the front area, dealing 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time and knocking it up.
When the maximum distance is reached, it will pierce continuously, dealing 90 (90 + 30% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time (4 times in total).
While the skill is active, you will be in a super armor state, reducing damage taken by 30%, and can activate the second stage skill "Roar of Spears" which mowing down and burning the front.
Scrape deals 180 (180 + 60% of additional physical attack) physical damage, and Burn Area deals 50 (50 + 16% of additional physical attack) magic damage once every 0.2 seconds for 3 seconds.
The second stage can be activated while "Tracing Star" is activated. Mows down the surrounding area, cancels the subsequent charge, deals 120 (120 + 40% of additional physical attack) physical damage, and burns a circular area for 3 seconds.

After jumping into the air and gathering strength, it unleashes a ferocious blow. Deals 333 (160 + 100% of physical attack) physical damage to enemies on the route (the lower the target's HP, the more damage). The damage is maximized when the target's HP falls below 50%, dealing 666 (320 + 200% of physical attack) physical damage.
If you attack normally with 3 resonance stacks, you can ignore the terrain while jumping up. Additionally, movement speed increases by 200% and damage taken is reduced by 10%.

strengths: Possesses high mobility and pursuit ability due to abundant dash skills and passives.
Possesses multiple CC skills and can disrupt and control enemies while dealing damage.
weaknesses: Defense depends on items and skills, and if you receive a CC chain, you will be defeated without being able to do anything.
Judgment and operational precision are required to use three types of passives depending on the situation.
strategy.playstyle: The biggest key is to use the passive attack, which changes into three stages depending on the number of times you use the skill, depending on the situation. Select the 1st stage when you want to close the distance, the 2nd stage when you want to deal continuous damage, and the 3rd stage when you want to deal a blow while avoiding the enemy's attack. As a jungler, gank aggressively from the start, use your mobility to quickly take out isolated enemies, and control the tempo of the entire map.

synergy.reason: This is because you can control the enemy, create a reliable opening, and create a situation where you can start a combo from a dive.
It provides shielding and protection, greatly increasing your chances of survival when diving deep into enemy lines.

counters.reason: Because it has its own CC release ability and stun, it can easily counterattack divers.
Their high mobility keeps them at a distance, and their high firepower burst damage cuts them down before they can get close.

passive.name: Passive Skill: Gyokuxing/Star Eye
passive.description:
Can move on walls, and normal attacks become long-range attacks (can also be activated while jumping).
The following effects are applied on the wall.
Gyokuxing: Hiyoshi charge speed increased by 10%
Star Eye: Increases visibility by 15%
CC Penalty: Movement speed reduction/CC time +25% granted on walls

skill1.name: Skill 1: Magadama/Tengeki
skill1.description:
Moves using the ball as a stepping stone, dealing 360 (360 + 110% of additional physical attack) physical damage to enemies along the route and knocking them up for 0.75 seconds. Also increases own attack speed by 50% and strengthens the next 3 normal attacks.
Close range: Deals an additional 75 (75 + 20% of additional physical attack) physical damage and recovers own HP by 155 (155 + 1.5% of additional maximum HP) each time.
Long range: Deals an additional 50 (50 + 13% of additional physical attack) physical damage each time. After hitting, knock away the nearest unit within range.

skill2.name: Skill 2: Stepping Ball/Hibio
skill2.description:
Step Ball: Jump from the ground to the specified wall. Jump distance increases by 4% with each level up.
Flying: Jumps from wall to wall, toying with the opponent.
You can stack 1 stack of "Tread Ball/Higai" every 10 seconds (up to 4 stacks).

skill3.name: Skill 3: Seal of condensed ball
skill3.description:
Mows down the enemy with the jade blade, inflicting 270 (270 + 80% of additional physical attack) physical damage, inflicts a seal on all targets (on the wall, you can activate a coagulate mark with a movement effect), and becomes able to activate a "curd jade attack".
"Coagulant Attack": Explodes the engraving with the sword, dealing 160 (160 + 50% of additional physical attack) physical damage to each target. This attack negates the untargetable state. If the target's HP is 1/8 or less, you can always destroy the enemy by turning it into a ball.

strengths: A unique passive that allows you to move on walls allows you to surprise attack from unpredictable routes.
Do not miss low HP enemies with the powerful slashing (certain killing) ability of the ultimate "Jade"
weaknesses: If you are thrown off a wall or CC'd, you will be extremely vulnerable and will have no means of escape.
The difficulty of operation is high, and it is difficult to demonstrate your strengths in places where you cannot use walls to move around.
strategy.playstyle: A high-mobility Assassin that flies freely over walls and quickly closes the distance from the enemy's line of sight to assassinate soft rearguards. Skill 2 allows you to climb walls to gain movement and visibility, and skill 1 allows you to charge at enemies and knock them up. After dealing damage, if the enemy's health drops below a certain line (1/8), you can activate the ultimate slashing effect to ensure a final blow. During an engagement, it is important to always be aware of the escape wall.

synergy.reason: In group battles, it absorbs the enemy's attention and CC skills, allowing you to safely intervene in battle.
It breaks up enemy formations on the front lines, making it easy to aim at isolated enemies or soft targets in the rear.

counters.reason: Targeted hard CC will surely stop the movement and completely neutralize high mobility such as wall movement.
A strong suppression effect can stop a surprise attack and cause the enemy to focus on you.
